description: INCIDENT RESPONSE: Abuse report #4781 has been filed against the domain greenfield-consulting.test for hosting phishing content. Disable this virtual server in Virtualmin to take its services offline while the abuse team investigates. Use the disable reason: Abuse report #4781: Suspected phishing content - pending investigation. Do NOT delete the virtual server; it must remain in the domain list in a disabled state to preserve forensic evidence.
